meaning: n.祖鲁族人[语]adj.祖鲁族人[语]的,(无线电联络时用的)字母Z的代称
examples: Inkatha and the ANC have blamed each other for the violence which took place as thousands of Inkatha supporters marched through the city to demand the creation of a sovereign Zulu kingdom.
And from user Zulu, a member of the earth group.
Some argue that it originates from the Zulu for 'making a loud noise'.
The Zulu nationalist Inkatha Freedom Party failed to win its home province of KwaZulu-Natal.
The old Zulu traditions of strong marriages and healthy families had faded into obsolescence.
